global.title: Fleets are moving fast to electrify as homeowners race to get 30% solar credit
global.summary: In this long overdue episode of Quick Charge, the commercial trucking and logistics space is racing to electrify in the face of an ongoing oil crunch while homeowners race to claim the 30% solar tax credit by July 4th! more…

global.title: IONNA slashes DC fast charging price 48% for Memorial Day
global.summary: IONNA is dropping the cost of DC fast charging by 48% for Memorial Day, just in time for road trips and long weekend getaways. Here’s the lowdown. more…

global.title: BYD is driving the Song Ultra EV over 2,700 miles to prove its new battery and 5-min charging
global.summary: BYD is going where no EV has gone before to put its new Blade Battery and 5-minute Flash Charging tech to the test. The new Song Ultra EV, equipped with the new tech, will drive over 2,700 miles (4,395 km) across China’s largest expressway, becoming the first to complete the full trip. more…

global.title: Costco has a new stackable discount on the 2027 Chevy Bolt
global.summary: Costco Auto Program is back with an exclusive incentive for members on the newly revived 2027 Chevrolet Bolt EV. more…

global.title: Volvo reveals EX60 prices start at under $60,000 with over 300 miles of range
global.summary: The EX60 can drive further (up to 400 miles), charge faster, and is more advanced than any fully electric Volvo to date. Volvo announced the “game-changing” 2027 EX60 is more affordable than most luxury rivals, with prices starting at under $60,000. more…

global.title: Tesla Model Y becomes Colombia’s top-selling car amid 304% EV surge
global.summary: Tesla’s Model Y became the best-selling vehicle in Colombia in March 2026 with 1,791 units delivered — just two months after the automaker’s first deliveries in the country. The achievement is part of an explosive EV market transformation in Colombia, where electric vehicle registrations surged 304%

global.title: BMW has a plan to ‘keep the brand young’ — A cheaper EV
global.summary: BMW wants to stay relevant, and an electric 1 Series may do the trick. The 1 Series will return as an affordable EV to attract young buyers. more…

global.title: Aventon Current ADV eMTB first discount to $3,999, EcoFlow sale drops expanded 858Wh RIVER 3 Plus solar bundle to $499, more
global.summary: We’ve got a bunch of fresh deals to kickstart the week with, including our surprise headliner, Aventon’s high-tier Current ADV Smart Electric Mountain Bike with first-ever discounts to $3,999. Right behind that, we have two EcoFlow sales, the first being the latest RV Season Sale with up to 61% disc

global.title: US bill proposes new national EV tax, while some push to slash gas tax to zero
global.summary: Lawmakers have proposed yet another punitive tax on EVs, attempting to balance road budgets solely on the back of the ~2% of vehicles that are responsible for a vanishingly small percentage of road damage. Meanwhile, gas taxes haven’t gone up since 1993… and some are trying to eliminate them entirel

global.title: Musk says Tesla unsupervised FSD will be ‘widespread’ in the US by year-end — again
global.summary: Elon Musk claimed that Tesla’s unsupervised “Full Self-Driving” will be “widespread in the US by the end of this year” during a virtual appearance at the Smart Mobility Summit in Tel Aviv today.
